settings.heading: Turn Any Corner Into a Living Garden.
settings.subheading: Microgreens kits for your home. Fresh. Simple. Rewarding.

settings.prop_1_text: Your kit sprouts and grows to harvest-ready microgreens in just 7-10 days.
settings.prop_2_text: Grow on any windowsill, kitchen counter, or shelf.
settings.prop_3_text: No chemicals, no pesticides - just premium seeds, organic growing medium, and water.

settings.heading: As Easy as 1, 2, 3
settings.subheading: No experience needed. Our kit comes with everything you need to grow beautiful microgreens at home.
settings.step_1_description: Add the included organic growing medium to your tray. Spread it evenly for the best results.
settings.step_2_description: Spread the premium seeds evenly across the surface and give them a gentle mist with water.
settings.step_3_description: In just 7-10 days your microgreens are ready. Snip just above the soil and enjoy.

settings.quote: I was sceptical but this kit is genuinely idiot-proof. Harvested my first batch in 9 days. The sunflower microgreens are incredible on avocado toast.
The quality of the seeds is outstanding. I've tried other kits but TinyHarvest is on another level. Ordered three more for gifts.
Such a lovely gift for my mum who doesn't have a garden. She calls it her tiny jungle now. Perfect product.

settings.heading: Join the Growing Community
settings.subtext: Tips, recipes, and early access to new kits - straight to your inbox.
settings.privacy_note: No spam. Unsubscribe any time. We respect your privacy.
